summary: Iteration 67 - Voucher Payment System Tests. Tested new payment system for Sale/Purchase/Gunny vouchers, CGST+SGST separate fields, sale invoice HTML generation, and cross-system accounting sync. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - payment buttons and dialogs working.
critical_code_review_comments: Console warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key' in Purchase Vouchers component - may need unique key fix
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ITR67_ prefix during testing, cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment system for vouchers fully tested. Sale voucher has existing data (Rajan Sales). Gunny Bags has entries with payment buttons visible. Purchase Vouchers section empty (no vouchers) but payment buttons are implemented and will appear when vouchers are created.

backend_tests: POST /api/voucher-payment for sale voucher - creates cash JAMA + ledger NIKASI + local_party payment entry, updates paid_amount/balance
POST /api/voucher-payment for purchase voucher - creates cash NIKASI + ledger NIKASI + local_party payment entry
POST /api/voucher-payment for gunny bag - creates cash NIKASI + updates gunny advance
Sale voucher creation auto-creates local_party_accounts debit entry + advance payment entry
Sale voucher deletion cleans up local_party_accounts entries
Purchase voucher creation auto-creates local_party_accounts debit entry
Gunny bag creation with CGST+SGST - separate cgst_amount and sgst_amount calculated correctly
Gunny bag creates local_party_accounts entry on creation
Sale invoice returns 404 for non-existent voucher
Sale payment creates Cash Book JAMA entry
Payment validation - invalid voucher type returns 400
Payment validation - voucher not found returns 404
frontend_verified: Sale Voucher row has payment (Rs.) and Printer buttons - 2 buttons found
Sale Voucher payment dialog opens with Party, Invoice, Total, Balance Due fields
Purchase Vouchers has payment button infrastructure (visible when vouchers exist)
Gunny Bags row has payment button - 2 buttons found
Gunny Bags form shows separate CGST% and SGST% fields when CGST+SGST type selected
